str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - coding-mindset
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: How to Overcome the Fear of Starting Your Own Tech Project
entry.summary: Unlock the potential of your tech dreams with our guide on overcoming the fear of starting a project. From defining vision to celebrating wins, discover 15 actionable strategies for a successful journey. Embrace the unknown and turn fear into fuel for your tech aspirations!

entry.title: How to Learn from Your Coding Mistakes
entry.summary: Transform coding mistakes into stepping stones for growth. This guide navigates the art of learning from errors, fostering a mindset of improvement. #LearnFromMistakes #CodingJourney
